businessQuestion: Which products are frequently purchased together?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    A.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_1,
    B.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_2,
    COUNT(*) AS FREQUENCY
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES A
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES B
ON A.ORDER_ID=B.ORDER_ID
AND A.PRODUCT_KEY<B.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY 1,2
ORDER BY FREQUENCY DESC
LIMIT 20;
businessContext: Merchandising teams want to optimize cross-selling and bundle recommendations.
